creator: wamuir@gmail.com
text: TensorFlow builds the Libtensorflow x86_64 binaries that it distributes for Linux and MacOS with AVX enabled -- see bazel config in the TF GitHub repo.  The AVX default, along iwith other CPU feature defaults, was a deliberate decision by the TF team and I think it'd made a lot of sense for the default FreeBSD builds to be consistent TF's defaults.
